code:
C4Context
    title System Context Diagram for an Inhabitant

    %% Inhabitant Boundary
    System_Boundary(b0, "Inhabitant") {
        System(SelfManagement, "Self-Management Module", "Monitors and manages the internal state, health, and behavior of the inhabitant.")
        System(LocalDecisionEngine, "Local Decision Engine", "Makes decisions autonomously based on internal and external inputs following predefined rules (e.g., Robert's Rules of Order).")
        System(LocalMessageQueue, "Local Message Queue", "Handles incoming and outgoing messages for internal and external communication.")
        System(LocalKnowledgeBase, "Local Knowledge Base", "Stores historical data, learning models, and decision rules for autonomous decision-making.")
        System(LocalReactor, "Local Reactor", "Enables reactive programming for real-time adaptation to changes or events.")
        System(LocalActionExecutor, "Action Executor", "Executes actions and commands based on the decisions made by the Local Decision Engine.")
    }

    %% External Components
    System_Ext(MessageBroker, "External Message Broker", "Facilitates communication between different inhabitants and external systems.")

    %% Internal Interactions
    Rel(SelfManagement, LocalDecisionEngine, "Provides state and health data")
    Rel(SelfManagement, LocalKnowledgeBase, "Stores and retrieves internal monitoring data")

    Rel(LocalDecisionEngine, LocalMessageQueue, "Sends and receives decision-related messages")
    Rel(LocalDecisionEngine, LocalActionExecutor, "Issues commands for execution")

    Rel(LocalMessageQueue, LocalReactor, "Triggers events based on messages")
    Rel(LocalReactor, LocalDecisionEngine, "Notifies about external or internal events")

    Rel(LocalKnowledgeBase, LocalDecisionEngine, "Provides historical data and rules")
    Rel(LocalKnowledgeBase, LocalActionExecutor, "Provides execution context")

    Rel(LocalActionExecutor, SelfManagement, "Reports execution status and outcomes")

    %% External Interactions
    Rel(LocalMessageQueue, MessageBroker, "Communicates with external systems")
    BiRel(LocalKnowledgeBase, MessageBroker, "Exchanges knowledge and data")
repo_description: A Ruby on Rails style framework for the DSPy (Demonstrate, Search, Predict) project for Language Models like GPT, BERT, and LLama.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们今天需要为Inhabitant系统画一个上下文图。这是一个自治实体，能够自主决策和执行动作。核心是一个Self-Management模块，负责监控内部状态和健康。
明白，Self-Management是核心监控模块。那这个Inhabitant的决策能力怎么体现？是完全依赖外部指令还是有自己的决策引擎？
有独立的决策能力。我加一个Local Decision Engine，基于内部和外部输入自主做决策，遵循类似Robert's Rules of Order这样的预定义规则。
好的，Local Decision Engine已加入Inhabitant边界内。那决策之后如何执行具体动作？需要执行器吗？
对，需要Action Executor来实际执行命令。另外还需要Local Knowledge Base存储历史数据、学习模型和决策规则，以及Local Message Queue处理内外通信。
已添加这三个模块。考虑到实时响应需求，是不是还需要一个Reactive组件来处理事件驱动的场景？
没错，加一个Local Reactor，支持响应式编程，能对变化或事件实时适配。现在Inhabitant内部有六个核心模块了。
确认一下内部模块：Self-Management、Local Decision Engine、Local Message Queue、Local Knowledge Base、Local Reactor、Action Executor。边界内结构完整了。外部交互怎么设计？
外部需要一个Message Broker，让不同Inhabitant之间以及和外部系统通信。这是外部组件。
External Message Broker已添加。现在开始梳理内部关系：Self-Management应该向Local Decision Engine提供状态和健康数据吧？
是的，Self-Management到Local Decision Engine，关系是"Provides state and health data"。另外Self-Management也要和Local Knowledge Base交互，存储和检索监控数据。
这两条关系已画好。Local Decision Engine和Local Message Queue之间应该有消息往来？
对，Local Decision Engine发送和接收决策相关的消息，标注为"Sends and receives decision-related messages"。
已添加。决策完成后，Local Decision Engine需要向Action Executor下发命令？
正确，"Issues commands for execution"。这是决策到执行的关键链路。
好的。Local Message Queue和Local Reactor之间呢？消息队列怎么触发响应式组件？
Local Message Queue基于消息触发事件给Local Reactor，标注"Triggers events based on messages"。然后Local Reactor要通知Local Decision Engine关于外部或内部事件。
这两条事件驱动关系已添加。Local Knowledge Base作为数据支撑，应该为决策引擎提供历史数据和规则？
是的，"Provides historical data and rules"。同时Local Knowledge Base也要给Action Executor提供执行上下文。
知识库的两条输出关系已画好。执行完成后，Action Executor需要反馈给Self-Management吗？
需要闭环，Action Executor向Self-Management"Reports execution status and outcomes"，这样Self-Management能持续监控。
内部闭环完成。现在处理外部交互：Local Message Queue通过Message Broker与外部系统通信？
对，"Communicates with external systems"。另外Local Knowledge Base和Message Broker之间应该是双向的知识数据交换。
双向关系"Exchanges knowledge and data"已添加。我检查一下，目前所有模块和关系都画完了吗？
等等，Self-Management和Local Knowledge Base的关系描述，我刚才说的是"存储和检索内部监控数据"，你确认一下画的是这个吗？
抱歉，我刚才漏了这条关系。现在补上：Self-Management到Local Knowledge Base，"Stores and retrieves internal monitoring data"。
好的，现在内部关系完整了。我再确认一下Local Reactor到Local Decision Engine的描述，是"Notifies about external or internal events"对吧？
确认无误。整个图结构清晰了：Inhabitant边界内六个模块形成自治闭环，通过Message Broker与外部交互。
Action Executor的命名，我原文是"Action Executor"，但模块列表里写的是"Local Action Executor"？需要统一。
统一为"Action Executor"，保持简洁，与其他Local前缀的模块区分，强调其执行职能。已修正。
最后确认一下Message Broker的描述："Facilitates communication between different inhabitants and external systems"，这个准确吗？
准确。我完整复核一遍：Self-Management监控并管理内部状态；Local Decision Engine基于Robert's Rules of Order等规则自主决策；Local Knowledge Base支撑数据和规则；Local Message Queue处理通信；Local Reactor实现响应式编程；Action Executor执行命令。
对，而且Self-Management和Local Decision Engine形成监控-决策闭环，Action Executor的执行结果又反馈给Self-Management，这是健康检查的关键。
Local Knowledge Base和Message Broker的双向关系，我理解是既能从外部获取知识更新，也能对外分享学习成果，对吗？
没错，这是分布式学习的基础。Local Message Queue通过Message Broker与外部通信，同时Local Knowledge Base双向交换知识，这样Inhabitant既能独立运行又能协同进化。
图已完成。标题定为"System Context Diagram for an Inhabitant"，完整展示了自治实体的内部架构和外部交互。
很好，这个图准确反映了设计意图。特别是Local Reactor的事件驱动机制，让系统能对内外变化实时响应，而不只是轮询处理。
确认最终版本：六个内部模块、一个外部Message Broker、十条内部关系、两条外部关系，全部验证通过。
可以定稿了。这个C4 Context图清晰展示了Inhabitant作为自治系统的边界和能力，后续可以基于此展开Container和Component级别的设计。
收到，最终图已锁定。所有模块描述和关系标注都经过核对，符合C4建模规范。
合作愉快，这个图可以直接用于架构评审了。
